message:
🌱 vault: Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not allowed' (#1113)

* 🌱 Add vault: Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Fix vault-14671 mission: correct type to bug, clarify docs workaround

Issue is a regression bug, not a feature. PR #14708 is docs-only (adds
known-issue entry), not a code fix. Updated type, issueTypes, step 3,
and resolution summary to accurately reflect the documentation workaround.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@ +{ + "version": "kc-mission-v1", + "name": "vault-14671-regression-oidc-login-role-with-oidc-role-type-is-not-allowed", + "missionClass": "solution", + "author": "KubeStellar Bot", + "authorGithub": "kubestellar", + "mission": { + "title": "vault: Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not allowed'", + "description": "Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not allowed'. Requested by 20+ users.", + "type": "bug", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Check current vault setup", + "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation." + }, + { + "title": "Review vault configuration", + "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nStarting in 1.10.0, our OIDC login flow will error with `Authentication failed: role with oidc role_type is not allowed`\n\nThe popup window will go to Microsoft (in my case) which returns a 200, on the page that says \"Completing the sign-in" + }, + { + "title": "Apply the documented workaround for OIDC login regression", + "description": "PR #14708 added a known-issue entry to the Vault 1.10 upgrade guide documenting this OIDC login regression. The workaround involves using the Vault CLI to log in via OIDC instead of the UI, or upgrading to a later Vault version where the regression was resolved.\n```bash\n# Use the CLI to log in via OIDC as a workaround\nvault login -method=oidc role=default\n```" + }, + { + "title": "Upgrade vault to include the fix", + "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade vault:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nvault version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/hashicorp/vault\n```" + }, + { + "title": "Verify the feature works", + "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not\u2026\" is functioning correctly." + } + ], + "resolution": { + "summary": "This regression in Vault 1.10.0 prevented OIDC login via the UI. PR #14708 added a known-issue entry to the 1.10 upgrade guide documenting the issue and workaround (use CLI login instead of UI). The underlying bug was subsequently fixed in later Vault releases.", + "codeSnippets": [ + "vault auth enable oidc\nvault write auth/oidc/config -<<\"EOH\"\n{\n \"oidc_client_id\": \"your_client_id\",\n \"oidc_client_secret\": \"your_client_secret\",\n \"default_role\": \"default\",\n \"oidc_discovery_url\": \"https://login.microsoftonline.com//v2.0\",\n \"oidc_response_mode\": \"form_post\",\n \"oidc_response_types\": [\n \"id_token\"\n ],\n \"provider_config\": {\n \"provider\": \"azure\"\n }\n}\nEOH\nvault write auth/oidc/role/default user_claim=\"preferred_username\" allowed_redirect_uris=\"http://localhost:8250/oidc/callback,https://vault.example.com/ui/vault/auth/oidc/oidc/callback\" groups_claim=\"groups\" policies=default oidc_scopes=\"https://graph.microsoft.com/.default profile\"", + "
vault read -format=json auth/oidc/config\n

", + "

\n
\n\n\n
vault read -format=json sys/auth/oidc\n

" + ] + } + }, + "metadata": { + "tags": [ + "vault", + "community", + "secrets", + "bug" + ], + "cncfProjects": [ + "vault" + ], + "targetResourceKinds": [], + "difficulty": "intermediate", + "issueTypes": [ + "bug" + ], + "maturity": "community", + "sourceUrls": { + "issue": "https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/issues/14671", + "repo": "https://github.com/hashicorp/vault", + "pr": "https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/pull/14708" + }, + "reactions": 20, + "comments": 30, + "synthesizedBy": "copilot" + }, + "prerequisites": { + "tools": [ + "vault" + ], + "description": "A working vault installation or development environment." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-03-14T06:46:15.057Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
